internal.h(3) Library Functions Manual internal.h(3)

NAME

internal.h - Internal WebSocket implementation types shared between transport.c and server.c.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct websocket_msg_t
WebSocket message element (individual frame or fragment). struct pending_free_item_t
Pending buffer free item for deferred cleanup Used to defer buffer freeing when permessage-deflate compression may still hold references asynchronously. struct websocket_transport_data_t
WebSocket transport implementation data.

Typedefs


typedef websocket_msg_t websocket_recv_msg_t

Detailed Description

Internal WebSocket implementation types shared between transport.c and server.c.
